title: Aurora, 61512, Eco Nation Teddy Bear, Soft Toy, Brown
features: Eco Nation is Aurora World’s fabulous range of Soft Toy Animals made from Recycled Plastics
Every soft toy is made using recycled plastics to include the fibre fill. No more plastic beans
Using embroidered eyes instead of plastics to make this item as Eco-Friendly as possible
Created an extremely soft and touchable Teddy Bear soft toy made for hugging and cuddles.
description: Eco Nation is Aurora World’s fabulous range of soft toys made from recycled plastics. Introducing our Teddy Bear. Every soft toy animal has been made using approx 8 x 500ml recycled plastic bottles. This includes the outer plush material and also the fibre fill. We have removed all plastic beans and are using embroidered instead of plastic eyes to make this item as Eco-friendly as possible. Our hangtag can be Recycled and is shaped as a plastic bottle showing the process of making our soft toy. We are very proud to have created such a gorgeous collection of extremely soft and touchable soft toys which will make a great gift. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
